fields.name: productmodeltype
fields.label: Content Model Type
fields.description: Select the model used for this product to determine the layout and API payload.

fields.name: productvieweventtype
fields.label: Product View Event Type
fields.description: Optional Launch event fired when the product page loads.

fields.name: addtocarteventtype
fields.label: Add To Cart Event Type
fields.description: Optional Launch event fired on Add to Cart click.

fields.name: showaddtowishlistbutton
fields.label: Show Add To Wishlist Button
fields.description: When disabled, Add to Cart and Add to Wishlist buttons are not rendered.

fields.name: addtowishlisteventtype
fields.label: Add To Wishlist Event Type
fields.description: Optional Launch event fired on Add to Wishlist click.

fields.name: showyoumayalsolikesection
fields.label: Show Related Products Section
fields.description: When disabled, the Related Products section is not rendered.

fields.name: relatedproductstitle
fields.label: Heading for Related Products section
fields.description: Authored heading will be displayed as a title of the Related Product Section.

fields.name: alt-variation
fields.label: Recipe Detail Variation for Halliby
fields.description: Features a full-width, 50/50 split header hero (image left, bold title right). Below is a 70/30 layout: a wide left column for rich-text ingredients/instructions, and a narrow right sidebar housing the chef's profile card and a vertical stack of compact recipe recommendation cards. Collapses to a single column on mobile. (Note: Styling will be required for other websites as the base styling is halliby only.)

fields.name: custom-class
fields.label: Custom class
fields.description: Space-separated class names to add to the block

fields.name: showextras
fields.label: Show Extras
fields.description: When enabled, an extras section with checkboxes will be shown based on the options authored below.

fields.name: extraoptions
fields.label: Extra Options
fields.description: If the extra options are enabled, the authored values will be shown as the extras in the UI.

fields.name: showquantity
fields.label: Show Quantity Dropdown
fields.description: When enabled, a quantity dropdown will be shown.

fields.name: maxquantity
fields.label: Quantity Options
fields.description: The number of quantity options to be shown from when adding to cart. The dropdown will be populated with values starting from 1 and ends on the number that is authored.
